tasks.title: Identify redundant .md documentation files in the project
tasks.description: Scan the project directory to find all markdown (.md) files and identify which ones are redundant duplicates or no longer needed based on naming, content similarity, or usage references.
acceptanceCriteria: A list of redundant markdown files to remove is generated
Files identified are confirmed to be duplicates or unused
tasks.expectedResult: A text file listing redundant markdown files to be deleted

outputPlan.description: List of candidate redundant markdown files

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a definitive list of redundant markdown files for removal

tasks.title: Delete identified redundant markdown files
tasks.description: Delete all markdown files listed in redundant_md_candidates.txt to remove redundant documentation files from the project.
acceptanceCriteria: All files listed in redundant_md_candidates.txt are deleted
tasks.expectedResult: Redundant markdown files are removed from the project directory

metadata.inputContext: List of redundant markdown files from previous task
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Cleans up the project by removing redundant markdown documentation files
